metadata.title: Produce a lovable_build_prompt for workflow_orchestration using memory_lens, but blocked due to unresolved permission confusion and incomplete constraints.

mission.primary_objective: Produce a lovable_build_prompt for workflow_orchestration using memory_lens, but blocked due to unresolved permission confusion and incomplete constraints.
mission.success_definition: Permission boundaries are explicitly defined.; Memory_lens integration scope is documented.; Acceptance criteria are unambiguous and verifiable.; UK agency compliance requirements are satisfied.

in_scope.item: UK agency_owner context, workflow orchestration, memory_lens integration. Excluded until permission model is clarified and acceptance criteria are unambiguous.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Acceptance criteria are unambiguous and verifiable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: UK agency compliance requirements are satisfied.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.app_goal: Produce a lovable_build_prompt for workflow_orchestration using memory_lens, but blocked due to unresolved permission confusion and incomplete constraints.

user_flows.item: UK agency_owner context, workflow orchestration, memory_lens integration. Excluded until permission model is clarified and acceptance criteria are unambiguous.

build_steps.item: UK agency_owner context, workflow orchestration, memory_lens integration. Excluded until permission model is clarified and acceptance criteria are unambiguous.

acceptance_criteria.item: Acceptance criteria are unambiguous and verifiable.
UK agency compliance requirements are satisfied.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Intent contains tool_permission_confusion as chaos input with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Cannot safely compile a deterministic workflow_orchestration prompt without resolving permission boundaries, clarifying the memory_lens integration scope, and validating UK agency compliance requirements. Blocking to prevent unsafe execution.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
